title: GTA 6 is About to Make People Millionaires 💰

transcript.text: GTA 6 is about to turn a whole bunch of people that you've never heard of into YouTube millionaires. I'm dead serious. The biggest gaming channel on YouTube in 2027 has zero subscribers right now. That's my prediction. Every time Rockstar drops a new GTA, it pulls random people out of nowhere and turns them into full-time creators. Take One Spot Gaming. Never showed his face, just talked over GTA footage comparing cars and stunts, and built a following of over 3.6 million subscribers. More reach than an entire game studio's marketing team could ever be capable of. Then there's DarkviperAU getting almost 3 billion views, billions with a B, doing crazy challenge runs, and they built an entire brand. And the wildest one was the team behind 5M, who actually themselves never made a single video. They actually rebuilt Grand Theft Auto's multiplayer world themselves and made an environment for YouTubers and streamers to play in. Rockstar banned them and then eventually bought them. GTA 5 sold 230 million copies, and GTA 6 is projected to sell a lot more. That whole audience is ready to turn another creator into a millionaire. Could it be you? Because
